title: Opinion: Opinion | China Now Has 7 Of The World's 10 Biggest Banks, And That Should Worry India
summary_full: Seven of the world's ten largest banks are now headquartered in China. Twenty-two Chinese banks figure in the top 100. No Indian bank comes anywhere close.
summary_public: Seven of the world's ten largest banks are now headquartered in China. Twenty-two Chinese banks figure in the top 100. No Indian bank comes anywhere close.
